'''pahungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobholder|jobholder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobholder|jobholder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pahungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæhingith|pæhingith]] || [[word:pæhingij|pæhingij]] || [[word:pæhingish|pæhingish]] || [[word:pæhingi|pæhingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pahuhunguth|pahuhunguth]] || [[word:pahuhunguj|pahuhunguj]] || [[word:pahuhungush|pahuhungush]] || [[word:pahuhungu|pahuhungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pahunguth|pahunguth]] || [[word:pahunguj|pahunguj]] || [[word:pahungush|pahungush]] || [[word:pahungu|pahungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pahufnguth|pahufnguth]] || [[word:pahufnguj|pahufnguj]] || [[word:pahufngush|pahufngush]] || [[word:pahufnguf|pahufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pahunguthu|pahunguthu]] || [[word:pahunguju|pahunguju]] || [[word:pahungushu|pahungushu]] || [[word:pahunguku|pahunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pahunguth|pahunguth]] || [[word:pahunguj|pahunguj]] || [[word:pahungush|pahungush]] || [[word:pahungu|pahungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pahunguthul|pahunguthul]] || [[word:pahungujul|pahungujul]] || [[word:pahungushul|pahungushul]] || [[word:pahungukul|pahungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pahunguthuthu|pahunguthuthu]] || [[word:pahungujuju|pahungujuju]] || [[word:pahungushushu|pahungushushu]] || [[word:pahunguku|pahunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pahunguthun|pahunguthun]] || [[word:pahungujun|pahungujun]] || [[word:pahungushun|pahungushun]] || [[word:pahungukun|pahungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pahunguthuoro|pahunguthuoro]] || [[word:pahungujuoro|pahungujuoro]] || [[word:pahungushuoro|pahungushuoro]] || [[word:pahungukuoro|pahungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
